title: HVAC Fault Code Dataset Schema
description: Platform-first fault code reference data for residential HVAC diagnostics. Schema supports gas furnaces, electric furnaces, heat pumps, AC units, and mini-splits. Designed for techs looking up codes mid-service call on mobile devices. v1.1.0 adds model_number_prefixes for nameplate-based platform identification and visual_identification for when the nameplate is inaccessible.

brands.description: All consumer-facing brand badges in this family

notes.description: Badge variant notes, market positioning, etc.

structural_overview.description: Plain-language summary of how this brand family handles fault codes. Shown as tool intro when tech picks the brand.

field_quirks.description: Brand-specific field knowledge that matters for diagnosis

platforms.description: Control board platform generations. Techs must identify platform before looking up codes.

platform_description.description: What equipment uses this board, how to identify it

applies_to_models.description: Model families that use this control board

applies_to_years.description: Rough year range for equipment installation (e.g., '2010-2026'). Used as secondary confirmation, not primary disambiguator.

model_number_prefixes.description: NEW in v1.1.0. Array of nameplate model-number prefix strings that match this platform (e.g., ['58SC0B', '58SC1B']). Tool performs case-insensitive prefix matching on user-entered model numbers. Primary disambiguator. Leave empty array if model-number prefixes are not reliably documented for this platform — use visual_identification and display_type instead.

visual_identification.description: NEW in v1.1.0. Short human-readable description of what the control board looks like. Used in the 'Don't know the model?' visual picker when the tech can't access the nameplate. Should be scannable in under 5 seconds (e.g., 'Two-color LED board (green + red) plus separate yellow flame LED').

display_type.description: How codes are displayed on this platform. Used as fallback disambiguator when model_number_prefixes can't resolve.

platform_notes.description: Platform-specific reset procedures, memory behavior, etc.

codes.description: All confirmed codes for this platform

communicating_ecosystem.description: If this brand family has a communicating ecosystem (iComfort, EcoNet, Affinity, ComfortBridge, etc.), describe what the thermostat/app surfaces vs. what the equipment board displays.

cross_generation_conflicts.description: Critical warnings where the same code identifier means different things across platform generations

code_identifier.description: Exact display as tech sees it (e.g., 'Green OFF / Red OFF', '3 flashes', 'E104')

meaning.description: OEM meaning, preferably verbatim from manual. Short phrase, no narrative.
